input.userMessage: นี่ ถ้าหนู restructured loan แล้ว credit score จะแย่ลงเยอะมั้ยคะ กังวลว่าจะกู้บ้านไม่ผ่านในอนาคตอ่ะ

expectedOutput.narrative: The customer is asking about the impact of loan restructuring on their credit score. They are concerned this could affect their ability to get a home loan in the future. The query is informational, so it is being routed to the education agent.
